CustomField.formula: (IF(ISPICKVAL( Type, "Out of Box Failure"), 30, 0)) + Product_Score__r.Product_Weight__c + (IF( ISPICKVAL( Q_Severity__c , "Serious"), 15, (IF(ISPICKVAL( Q_Severity__c , "Medium"), 5, (IF(ISPICKVAL( Q_Severity__c, "Minimal"), 1, 0)))))) + (IF(ISPICKVAL( Q_Complaint__c , "Yes"), 10, 0)) + (IF( ISPICKVAL( Q_Safety_Concern__c , "Serious"), 10, (IF(ISPICKVAL( Q_Safety_Concern__c , "Possible"), 5, (IF(ISPICKVAL( Q_Safety_Concern__c , "Minimal"), 1, 0)))))) + (IF( ISPICKVAL( Q_Revenue_Impact__c , "High"), 10, (IF(ISPICKVAL(Q_Revenue_Impact__c , "Medium"), 5, (IF(ISPICKVAL(Q_Revenue_Impact__c , "Low"), 1, 0)))))) + (IF( ISPICKVAL( Q_Occurrences__c , "1"), 1, (IF(ISPICKVAL( Q_Occurrences__c , "2 - 5"), 3, (IF(ISPICKVAL( Q_Occurrences__c , "5 or More"), 5, 0)))))) + (IF( ISPICKVAL( Q_Exposure__c , "All Customers"), 5, (IF(ISPICKVAL( Q_Exposure__c , "Product Line"), 3, (IF(ISPICKVAL( Q_Exposure__c, "Single"), 1, 0))))))
CustomField.label: Priority Sum
